mapper.select: select nick_name from user where id = #{id}

select count(case when process_type = '退货退款' then 1 end) as '退货退款', count(case when process_type = '仅退货' then 1 end) as '仅退货', count(case when process_type = '仅退款' then 1 end) as '仅退款', count(case when process_type IN ('换货', '退货换新') then 1 end) as '退换货' from process where effect_id = #{shopId}
